results.title: Smart Ration Card: Soon ration will be available through QR code and face verification, know the details
results.description: Smart Ration Card: About 17 lakh ration card holders of the capital are expected to benefit from the new Smart-PDS system. According to the government, this technology will make the ration distribution system more transparent, secure and digital. Also, under the ‘One Nation One Ration Card’ scheme, eligible beneficiaries will be able to go to [...] The post Smart Ration Card: Soon ration will be available through QR code and face verification, know the details first appeared on informalnewz .

results.title: Sycamore Development transforms historic Cabana Hotel with $70M project
results.description: Apartments and townhomes now stand where music royalty — including The Beatles, Led Zeppelin and Jimi Hendrix — once slept.

results.title: Isla Vista Residents Will Vote on Utility Tax Measure This Fall
results.description: Isla Vista residents will have a chance to vote on a new tax measure for infrastructure and service improvements on Nov. 3. results.title: Delhi allows restaurants, bars to stay open till 4am for FIFA World Cup final
results.description: The Delhi government has allowed restaurants, cafes, and bars across the Capital to remain open until 4am on Monday to facilitate live screenings of the FIFA World Cup 2026 final

results.title: Man quits Rs 38,000-a-month job, starts tea shop, now earns Rs 1.8 lakh every month
results.description: A viral X post claims a former Teleperformance employee quit his Rs 38,000-a-month job, invested Rs 2 lakh in a tea shop, and is now earning close to Rs 1 lakh in profit every month.
